# Vendored Sources

## mattpocock-skills

- Source: `https://github.com/mattpocock/skills`
- Vendored revision: `d574778f94cf620fcc8ce741584093bc650a61d3`
- Upstream package version: 1.1.0 (CHANGELOG)
- License: MIT, preserved at `vendor/mattpocock-skills/LICENSE`
- yishuship adapter: `skills/.shared/matt-pocock-standard.md`

The vendored files are treated as upstream reference material. yishuship
skills should reference them instead of copying their contents inline.

### 1.1.0 naming map (breaking for old aliases)

| Old (vendor pre-sync) | New (upstream 1.1) |
|-----------------------|--------------------|
| `to-prd` | `to-spec` |
| `to-issues` / `to-plan` | `to-tickets` |
| `decision-mapping` (in-progress) | `wayfinder` |
| (none) | `research` (new) |
